notes: LEASE-LEVEL DISCOVERY PROXY, not a per-well result: the borehole's BOTM_LEASE_NUMBER appears in BOEM's Field Names Master List (mastdatadelimit.zip), i.e. the lease was assigned to a discovered field. Biases carried on the dataset card: appraisal/development wells on a matched lease inherit the match; a dry wildcat on a lease that later proved productive is a false positive. 49,921 of 55,513 REGION_CODE='G' boreholes in the 2026-07-18 snapshot (E-wells 74.1%, D-wells 98.9%)

Proxy negative: BOTM_LEASE_NUMBER absent from the Field Names Master List — no field was ever attributed to the lease. Includes the literal lease values NOLEASE and DPST (deep stratigraphic tests) which never match by construction. False negatives possible for discoveries never formally assigned to a field. shows=false because the proxy carries no shows/traces information at all. 5,592 of 55,513 REGION_CODE='G' boreholes in the 2026-07-18 snapshot
